content.text:
*long pause*

I think... I'm scared that wanting to be completely alone, genuinely alone, means something is wrong with us. With me and my partner. Like a normal person who loves their family wouldn't need to escape it.

*quieter*

And I do love them. I love my kids, I love my partner. But I am so tired. I give everything at work, I come home and I give everything there, and somewhere in all of that I just... I don't know where I went. And I'm scared that if I say that out loud it means the life I've built is the problem.

*quickly*

Which I don't think it is. I think I'm just tired. Right?
